info.title: Coding Agent Stats
info.description: 研发中心 Coding Agent 绩效统计平台

post.description:
Login endpoint to get access and refresh tokens.

Accepts JSON body with username and password.

Args:
    request: JSON body with username and password.
    db: Database session.
    auth_svc: Auth service module.

Returns:
    Token response with access and refresh tokens.

Raises:
    HTTPException: If authentication fails.

Refresh access token using refresh token.

Args:
    request: Refresh token request.
    db: Database session.
    auth_svc: Auth service module.

Returns:
    New access token response.

Raises:
    HTTPException: If refresh token is invalid.

Logout endpoint to invalidate tokens.

Args:
    request: Logout request with optional refresh token.
    token: Current access token from Authorization header.
    auth_svc: Auth service module.

Returns:
    Logout success message.

Raises:
    HTTPException: If logout fails.

get.description:
Get current user information.

Args:
    current_user: Current authenticated user.

Returns:
    User information.

Get list of users.

Args:
    db: Database session.
    current_user: Current authenticated user.
    page: Page number (1-indexed).
    pageSize: Number of users per page.

Returns:
    User list with pagination info.

post.description:
Create a new user.

Args:
    user_data: User creation data.
    db: Database session.
    current_user: Current authenticated user.

Returns:
    Created user.

Raises:
    HTTPException: If username or email already exists.

get.description:
Get user by ID.

Args:
    user_id: User ID.
    db: Database session.
    current_user: Current authenticated user.

Returns:
    User.

Raises:
    HTTPException: If user not found.

put.description:
Update user.

Args:
    user_id: User ID.
    user_data: User update data.
    db: Database session.
    current_user: Current authenticated user.

Returns:
    Updated user.

Raises:
    HTTPException: If user not found or permission denied.

delete.description:
Delete user.

Args:
    user_id: User ID.
    db: Database session.
    current_user: Current authenticated user (must be admin).

Raises:
    HTTPException: If user not found or permission denied.

get.description:
Get current authenticated user information.

Args:
    current_user: Current authenticated user from token.

Returns:
    Current user information.

patch.description:
Update current user profile.

Args:
    user_data: Profile update data.
    db: Database session.
    current_user: Current authenticated user.

Returns:
    Updated user information.

post.description:
Change current user password.

Args:
    password_data: Old and new password data.
    db: Database session.
    current_user: Current authenticated user.

Raises:
    HTTPException: If old password is incorrect.

get.description:
Get projects for current user.

Args:
    db: Database session.
    current_user: Current authenticated user.

Returns:
    List of projects the user is a member of.
